title: iberis ciliata var. senneniana
intro: Iberis ciliata var. senneniana, also known as Sennen's candytuft, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Iberis ciliata plant, which is a flowering plant in the mustard family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been utilized to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Sennen's candytuft include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, Iberis ciliata var. senneniana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional due to the limited scientific evidence available.
